info.title: CleanReport API
info.description:
# CleanReport — Community Waste & Sanitation Issue Reporting

## Overview
REST API for reporting sanitation issues (overflowing bins, illegal dumping, blocked drains)
with photo evidence and GPS location. Reports are publicly visible and tracked through a
status lifecycle (Reported → Acknowledged → In Progress → Resolved).

## Authentication
Most write endpoints require a JWT Bearer token. Get a token by calling `/auth/register` or `/auth/login`.
Then click the **Authorize** button above and enter: `Bearer <your-token>`

Token expiry:
- **Access token:** 15 minutes
- **Refresh token:** 7 days

## Standard Response Format
All responses follow this envelope:
```json
{
  "success": true/false,
  "message": "Human-readable message",
  "data": { ... },
  "timestamp": "2026-07-13T12:00:00Z"
}
```

## Error Codes
| HTTP Code | Meaning | When |
|-----------|---------|------|
| 400 | Bad Request | Validation failed (missing/invalid fields) |
| 401 | Unauthorized | Missing or invalid JWT token, or wrong credentials |
| 403 | Forbidden | Valid token but insufficient permissions (e.g. non-admin accessing /admin) |
| 404 | Not Found | Resource doesn't exist (report ID, user) |
| 409 | Conflict | Duplicate resource (email already registered) |
| 413 | Payload Too Large | File exceeds 5MB limit |
| 500 | Internal Server Error | Unexpected server error |

## Error Response Format
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "message": "Description of what went wrong",
  "errors": { "fieldName": "specific error" },
  "timestamp": "2026-07-13T12:00:00Z"
}
```

## Enums
**ReportCategory:** `OVERFLOW` | `ILLEGAL_DUMPING` | `BLOCKED_DRAIN`

**ReportStatus:** `REPORTED` | `ACKNOWLEDGED` | `IN_PROGRESS` | `RESOLVED`

**ReportUrgency:** `ROUTINE` | `URGENT` | `CRITICAL`

**UserRole:** `REPORTER` | `ADMIN`

## Rate Limits
- 100 requests per minute per IP (free tier)

## Base URL
Production: `https://cleanreport-api.onrender.com/api/v1`

tags.name: Credits
tags.description: View credit balance and transaction history. Credits earned from report submissions and resolutions.

tags.name: Area Statistics
tags.description: District overview and area-level report statistics

tags.name: Comments
tags.description: Add, view, and delete comments on reports

tags.name: Rewards
tags.description: Browse reward catalog and claim rewards with credits

tags.name: Saved Filters
tags.description: Save, list, and delete custom report filter presets

tags.name: Admin
tags.description: Admin-only endpoints for managing reports. Requires ADMIN role.

tags.name: Reports
tags.description: Submit sanitation issue reports, search, view stats, filter by status/category/location.

tags.name: Status Management
tags.description: Update report status (admin only) and view status history (public)

tags.name: Authentication
tags.description: User registration and login. Returns JWT tokens for authenticated requests.

get.summary: Get status history for a report
get.description:
Returns the full timeline of status changes for a report.
Sorted newest first. Includes who made each change, the note, and timestamp.

**Public endpoint — no auth required.**

put.description:
Transitions a report to a new status. Only forward transitions allowed:
REPORTED → ACKNOWLEDGED → IN_PROGRESS → RESOLVED

Attempting to go backward (e.g., RESOLVED → REPORTED) returns 400.
Each change is recorded in status history with who changed it and optional note.

**Requires ADMIN role.**

post.description:
Spend credits to claim a reward. Deducts credits from balance immediately.
Returns 400 if insufficient credits or reward out of stock.
Claim status starts as PENDING (admin approves later).

get.description:
Returns a paginated list of all reports. **Public endpoint — no auth required.**

**Filters:**
- `status`: REPORTED, ACKNOWLEDGED, IN_PROGRESS, RESOLVED
- `category`: OVERFLOW, ILLEGAL_DUMPING, BLOCKED_DRAIN, STREET_LITTER, RESIDENTIAL_DUMP, COMMERCIAL_DUMP

**Pagination:**
- `page`: 0-based page number (default: 0)
- `size`: items per page (default: 20, max: 100)

**Sorting:** Always newest first (createdAt DESC).

post.description:
Creates a sanitation issue report. Requires authentication (Bearer token).

**Flow:**
1. Frontend uploads photo to Cloudinary → gets photoUrl
2. Frontend captures GPS coordinates from browser
3. User selects category and optionally adds title + description
4. Submit this endpoint with all data
5. If no address provided, reverse geocoding auto-fills it from coordinates

**Credits:** Reporter earns +10 credits on successful submission.

**Reference number:** A unique CR-XXXXX number is generated for tracking.

**Categories:** OVERFLOW, ILLEGAL_DUMPING, BLOCKED_DRAIN, STREET_LITTER, RESIDENTIAL_DUMP, COMMERCIAL_DUMP

**Urgency levels:** ROUTINE (default), VERY_URGENT, CRITICAL

401.description: Not authenticated — include Bearer token in Authorization header

400.description: Validation error (missing photo, category, or coordinates)

get.summary: Get all comments for a report
get.description: Returns all comments on a report in chronological order (oldest first). **Public endpoint.**

post.summary: Add a comment to a report
post.description:
Adds a comment to a report. Requires authentication.
Admin comments are automatically flagged with is_moderator = true.

get.description: List all saved filter presets for the current user.

post.description: Save filter configuration for quick access. Max 10 per user.

After registration, user receives a 6-digit code (via email or from logs in dev).
Submit the code here to verify the email address. Code expires after 10 minutes.

Validates the reset token from the email link and sets a new password.
Token expires after 15 minutes. Can only be used once.
Generates and sends a new 6-digit verification code. Previous code is invalidated.

Creates a new account with REPORTER role. Returns JWT access token (15 min)
and refresh token (7 days). The access token must be included in the
Authorization header for all authenticated endpoints: `Authorization: Bearer <token>`

400.description: Validation error — email invalid, password too short, or display name missing

errors.password: Password must be at least 8 characters

201.description: User registered successfully. Returns tokens + user details.

post.description:
Exchange a valid refresh token for a new access token + refresh token pair.
Call this when the access token expires (after 15 min) to avoid forcing re-login.
The old refresh token is invalidated.

Authenticates an existing user. Returns JWT access token (15 min) and
refresh token (7 days). Use the access token in the Authorization header
for protected endpoints.

200.description: Login successful. Returns tokens + user details.

post.description:
Exchange a Google ID token for CleanReport JWT tokens.

**Frontend flow:**
1. User clicks "Sign in with Google" button
2. Google Sign-In returns an ID token
3. Frontend sends that token to this endpoint
4. Backend verifies with Google, creates user if first time, returns our JWT

**Auto-creates user on first login** with REPORTER role.
If user already exists (same email), returns tokens for existing account.

200.description: Google login successful. Returns JWT tokens + user details.

401.description: Invalid Google token or email not verified

post.description:
Sends a password reset email with a time-limited token (15 min).
Always returns 200 even if email doesn't exist (prevents email enumeration).

Exchange a Facebook access token for CleanReport JWT tokens.
Frontend uses Facebook Login SDK, sends the access token here.
Auto-creates user on first login. Requires public email permission.

Exchange Apple identity token for CleanReport JWT tokens.
Apple only sends user name on first sign-in — frontend must pass email and fullName.
Auto-creates user on first login.

get.description: Returns all available rewards sorted by credits required (cheapest first). **Public endpoint.**
Returns all rewards claimed by the authenticated user, newest first.

Returns full details of a single report including reporter name
(or "Anonymous" if submitted anonymously), photo URL, GPS coordinates,
title, address, status, and timestamps. **Public endpoint.**

Returns aggregated statistics for the dashboard:
- Total reports count
- Resolved vs pending count
- Breakdown by status
- Breakdown by category
- Total community credits earned
- Total registered users

**Public endpoint — no auth required.**

Full-text search across report title, description, and address.
Uses PostgreSQL's `to_tsvector` for efficient text matching.
**Public endpoint — no auth required.**

**Example:** `/reports/search?q=drainage&page=0&size=10`

Returns all reports within a given radius of GPS coordinates.
Uses PostGIS geospatial query. **Public endpoint.**

**Example:** `/reports/nearby?lat=6.5244&lng=3.3792&radius=5`
→ all reports within 5km of Lekki, Lagos.

Returns all reports submitted by the currently authenticated user.
Requires Bearer token. Sorted newest first.
Returns top contributors ranked by credit balance. Default top 20. **Public endpoint.**

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of top users to return (max 50)

get.description: Returns UP if the service is running

Returns paginated list of all credit transactions for the authenticated user.
Sorted newest first. Shows amount, reason, related report, and timestamp.
Returns the current credit balance for the authenticated user. Each credit = ₦1 value.

Returns report counts grouped by area_name (district).
Shows total, resolved, pending per area. Sorted by total reports descending.
**Public endpoint.**

get.summary: Get stats for a specific area/district
get.description: Returns detailed stats for a single area by name (partial match).

get.summary: List all reports with advanced filters (Admin only)
get.description:
Enhanced report listing for admin dashboard. Supports all public filters
plus date range and area filtering, with configurable sort order.

**Filters:**
- `status`: REPORTED, ACKNOWLEDGED, IN_PROGRESS, RESOLVED
- `category`: OVERFLOW, ILLEGAL_DUMPING, BLOCKED_DRAIN, STREET_LITTER, RESIDENTIAL_DUMP, COMMERCIAL_DUMP
- `from` / `to`: Date range filter (ISO format: 2026-07-01)
- `area`: Filter by area_name (partial match)

**Sort:** `sortBy` (createdAt, updatedAt, category, status) + `direction` (asc, desc)

**Requires ADMIN role.**

delete.description: Delete a comment. Only the author or an admin can delete a comment.
Remove a saved filter preset. Only owner can delete.

note.description: Optional note explaining the status change

changedById.description: User ID of who changed it

title.description: Short title for the report (optional, max 100 chars)

description.description: Short description of the issue (max 200 chars)
description.example: Large pile of waste near the school gate

address.description: Manual address (optional — auto-filled via reverse geocoding if not provided)

urgency.description: Urgency level (defaults to ROUTINE if not provided)

content.example: The cleanup team has been dispatched to this location.

isModerator.description: True if the comment was made by an admin/moderator

rememberMe.description: If true, refresh token lasts 30 days instead of 7

idToken.description: Google ID token obtained from Google Sign-In on the frontend

accessToken.description: Facebook access token from Facebook Login SDK

identityToken.description: Apple identity token from Sign In with Apple JS

email.description: User email (Apple only sends on first sign-in, frontend must pass it)

fullName.description: User's full name (Apple only sends on first sign-in)

pendingReports.description: Count of pending reports (reported + acknowledged + in_progress)

nextLevelAt.description: Lifetime credits needed for next level (-1 if max)

CreditBalanceResponse.description: User credit balance with level and streak info

errors.password: Password must be at least 8 characters

401.description: Unauthorized — missing/invalid token or wrong credentials

404.description: Not Found — resource does not exist

Bearer Auth.description: JWT access token from /auth/login or /auth/register. Format: `Bearer eyJhbGciOiJ...`
